description_long: This is a long, rectangular wooden shelf or cabinet with open compartments, designed for organizing or displaying items. The structure features multiple evenly spaced sections, each containing various metallic and plastic components, possibly tools or mechanical parts. The exterior is finished in a warm, natural wood tone, while the interior compartments are filled with objects of different shapes and colors, including metallic cylinders and rods. The top of the unit is open, allowing easy access to the contents, and the sides are solid wood panels. The overall design suggests it is intended for use in a workshop, garage, or utility area, where organization and visibility of stored items are important. The craftsmanship appears sturdy, with a focus on functionality and durability.
description: A long, open wooden shelf or cabinet with multiple compartments, each holding various metallic and plastic items. The unit is sturdy and functional, ideal for organizing tools or mechanical parts.
description_view_0: Front view showing all compartments and their visible contents, with the open top and solid wood sides clearly displayed.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the depth of the compartments and a partial view of the stored items, emphasizing the unit's rectangular shape.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the solid wood back panel and the tops of the stored items, with less detail of the compartment interiors.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, highlighting the length and depth of the unit and the arrangement of items inside.
